calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney Nicolas A. Daluiso of Robinson Tait P.S. (206-876-3268), via Court Call, counsel for defendant/moving party
No appearance by any other party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT BANK OF AMERICA'S Motion For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Moving party established its claim. No opposition filed. Request for telephonic appearance is granted. Requesting party must obtain a Court Call code from the Clerk of the Court. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Mtn To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Seth Harris, Esq. of McCarthy & Holthus, LLP, (619-955-1529), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL, for Plaintiff and moving party.
Nicolas A. Daluiso, Esq. of Robinson Tait, P.S., (206-876-3268), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Respondent and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RECON TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare and order. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: B. Paredes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's Motion to Deposit Surplus Funds is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and this Court's Order of July 15, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER RECON TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds is Continued to August 14, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than July 26, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn On (Proposed) Order To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Apr-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RECON TRUST COMPANY'S MOTION ON (PROPOSED) ORDER TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as to Department 302. The matter should be set in Department 501. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Hearing For Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Hearing for Claimant BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds is denied. Failed to sustain burden, no evidence money was deposited with the court. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the court's ruling. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Disburse Surplus Proceeds
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CLAIMANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds - The motion is transferred to be heard in Department 501 on the same date at the same time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Disburse Surplus Proceeds
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Continued To Mar-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CLAIMANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds is continued to March 1, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide the moving papers by February 4, 2013. Please attach a cover letter confirming the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
